federal_contracts.description: ICS EVENT SUPPORT AND TRAVEL TO CANNON AFB FOR ANDURIL EVENT SUPPORT OF A600M LIVE FIRE TEST 6 DEC 2025. TRAVEL SHALL OCCUR ON 4 DEC 2025 FOR ANDURIL TO BE IN PLACE TO BEGIN EVENT ON 5 DEC 2025. A TOTAL OF 3X FSRS. ONE AT NTTR AND TWO AT CANNON AFB.

PROCURE THE BASE YEAR COSTS WITH BASE YEAR OPERATIONS AND SUSTAINMENT, AND 5-YEAR OPERATIONS AND SUSTAINMENT SUPPORT WITH OPTIONS. Y12 SITE. PROVIDING A COUNTER UNCREWED AIRCRAFT SYSTEM (CUAS) PLATFORM FOR THE NATIONAL NUCLEAR SECURITY ADMINISTRATION

PROCURE THE BASE YEAR COSTS WITH BASE YEAR OPERATIONS AND SUSTAINMENT, AND 5-YEAR OPERATIONS AND SUSTAINMENT SUPPORT WITH OPTIONS. PANTEX SITE. PROVIDING A COUNTER UNCREWED AIRCRAFT SYSTEM (CUAS) PLATFORM FOR THE NATIONAL NUCLEAR SECURITY ADMINISTRAT
SIP TO 124 - MODULAR MOBILE KINETIC DEFEAT CAPABILITY
SITE SURVEY AND TRAVEL/ODCS FOR I-CSUAS AT CAMP SMITH
PROGRAM MANAGEMENT AND SUPPORT FOR CES UNDER PM GBAD
COUNTER UNMANNED SYSTEMS (CUXS) SYSTEMS INTEGRATION PARTNER (SIP) PULSAR-LITE TEST HARDWARE, TASK ORDER 125
PHASE II INTEGRATION OF ROADRUNNER INTO THE FAAD C2 ARCHITECTURE.
NEW TASK ORDER INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY, 90 DAY TEST BED FOR SUPPORT ACTIVITIES.
TO 116 - HEIMDALL PROCUREMENT AND CL BUY OUT
SIP TO 111 FSR AND TRAINING SUPPORT
